query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM organizations) as total_orgs,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users) as total_users,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM responses) as total_responses,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM intakeFileAttachments) as total_files;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 27oV2HNhPbfG1Yy.f6bc15b848e8 --database hgGEXRHUCG7apwzJRKH7LF --execute SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM organizations) as total_orgs,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users) as total_users,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM responses) as total_responses,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM intakeFileAttachments) as total_files;
